phrases.intent_en: Ask what the Spanish Quarter is known for
phrases.text_local: Scusi, per cosa sono famosi i Quartieri Spagnoli?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, per KOH-zah SOH-noh fah-MOH-zee ee kwahr-TYEH-ree span-YOH-lee?
phrases.cultural_note: The Spanish Quarter is known for its street shrines, washing lines between buildings, and the birthplace of Totò, Naples' beloved comedian.

responses.english: For the lanes, murals and authentic Neapolitan life.
responses.phonetic: per ee VEE-koh-lee, ee moo-RAH-lehs eh eel VEH-roh STEEL deh VEE-tah nah-poh-leh-TAH-noh.
responses.french: Per i vicoli, i murales e il vero stile di vita napoletano.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find a traditional Neapolitan café
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è un bar napoletano tradizionale qui?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH oon bar nah-poh-leh-TAH-noh trah-dee-tsyoh-NAH-leh kwee?

responses.english: Bar Mexico on Via Tribunali, excellent coffee.
responses.phonetic: bar meh-HEE-koh een VEE-ah tree-boo-NAH-lee, kaf-FEH et-chel-LEN-teh.
responses.french: Bar Mexico in Via Tribunali, caffè eccellente.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the Spanish Quarter is safe for tourists
phrases.text_local: Scusi, i Quartieri Spagnoli sono sicuri per i turisti?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ee kwahr-TYEH-ree span-YOH-lee SOH-noh see-KOO-ree per ee too-REES-tee?

responses.english: Daytime yes, watch your bags in the evening.
responses.phonetic: dee JOR-noh see, at-ten-TSYOH-neh AL-leh BOR-seh dee SEH-rah.
responses.french: Di giorno sì, attenzione alle borse di sera.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the famous Totò mural is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il murales di Totò?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel moo-RAH-lehs dee TOH-toh?

responses.english: On Vico Lungo Gelso, you'll find it easily.
responses.phonetic: een VEE-koh LOON-goh JEL-soh, loh TROH-vah fah-cheel-MEN-teh.
responses.french: In Vico Lungo Gelso, lo trova facilmente.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to eat a cheap and authentic lunch
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si pranza bene e a buon prezzo qui?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see PRAN-tsah BEH-neh eh ah bwohn PRET-tsoh kwee?

responses.english: In any trattoria in the lanes, all excellent.
responses.phonetic: een kwal-see-AH-zee trat-toh-REE-ah day VEE-koh-lee, TOOT-tee ot-TEE-mee.
responses.french: In qualsiasi trattoria dei vicoli, tutti ottimi.
